description: Maintainer of GitMesh - an AI-agent governance platform selected into the Linux Foundation Decentralized Trust (LFDT). Grew it to 130+ GitHub stars.
highlights: Multi-agent orchestration on a governed MCP platform for OSS projects
Selected into Linux Foundation Decentralized Trust
Policy-as-code for AI agents: GitHub/GitLab sync, audit logging, maintainer-controlled approvals

description: Built and shipped PARAM - a blockchain academic-credential platform for ABV-IIITM Gwalior, live at production-pilot scale.
highlights: Monorepo: Next.js 16 + React 19 frontend (Privy, shadcn); Express 5 API; isolated BullMQ worker for CSV, mint, email, and cron on AWS EC2 eu-north-1
End-to-end workflows - faculty grades → academic review → admin approve → mint on Base Sepolia; degree proposals with credit/backlog eligibility checks
30+ Prisma models; modules for students, curriculum, results, approvals, degrees, credentials, issuance, verification, audit; Zod-validated APIs
ERC-721 credentials (SemesterNFT, DegreeNFT, CertificateNFT) + SHA-256 anchoring; public /verify with share links, QR, and hash/tokenId API
CI matrix: Vitest integration + supertest, Foundry contracts, Playwright e2e; live pilot at param-iiitm.vercel.app (Vercel arn1 + Supabase Postgres)
